title: Epic Fight Plus - Better Trails
description: Minecraft Friendly Trails for Epic Fight Mod!
body:
Good evening!!

This simple resource pack overhauls the epic fight trails.

Bring back pixelation for a friendlier vanilla look, if you catch my drift!


> Compatible with Epic Fight in MC 1.20.1 <


Future Plans:

- Overhaul trails from other important EFM addons.

Thank you!!
